caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Affect Southern Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Aruba is experiencing moderate northeast winds sustained at 21 kt with wave heights reaching 5.6 ft and a swell period of 8 seconds. The area has a 37% rain probability, indicating scattered showers, while Martinique sees lighter winds at 13 kt and less significant marine conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Dubrovnik Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing moderate southerly winds up to 15 kt with wave heights reaching 3.2 ft and a swell period of 5 seconds. Rain probability is at 56% creating wet conditions for the port while Marseille faces slightly stronger winds up to 20 kt but less rain impact.
